node.statement: STEP: RG coarse-graining in the time direction maps the 2D model to a 1D chain of N spins. Only vertical domain configurations survive. The Thouless length L(t) = L_0 e^{t/τ} with τ^{-1} = log((d^2+1)/(2d)) controls the domain wall cost. Each vertical DW in the bulk costs 1/L(t), and bulk domains contribute N/L(t)^2 (multiplicity × two DW costs). Boundary domains contribute 1/L(t) (single DW). [Ground truth: main.tex line 228, τ^{-1}=log((d^2+1)/(2d))]
